name: yijing-tarot-openclaw
description: OpenClaw bundle for the baziback I Ching and tarot MCP tools.

interface.shortDescription: Run baziback divination tools inside OpenClaw.
interface.longDescription: Connects OpenClaw to baziback's stdio MCP server so the assistant can run I Ching and tarot workflows against your local backend.
defaultPrompt: Run a quick I Ching divination for my question.
Draw a tarot spread and explain the result.
Look up a hexagram or tarot card from baziback.
